# 2026-05-09

ok the BW customer concentration thing is confirmed. it's [Globex Manufacturing](https://www.globex-mfg.example.com/about). 23.4% of revenue last fiscal, was 19% three years ago. concentration *is* growing. that's not a tail risk anymore — that's a thesis-defining risk.

source: [sector report appendix B](../external/sector-report-q1-2026.html#appendix-b-customer-concentration). pulled it. saved excerpts to [BW company note](../companies/betawidgets-inc.md#customer-concentration).

## the math

- BW revenue ~$1.2B
- Globex contribution ~$280M
- if globex switches even 30% of spend to a competitor (us? GammaTech?) → ~$84M revenue hit
- on ~28% gross margin that's ~$24M GP hit
- ~$0.18 EPS impact on ~140M shares
- street is at $2.05. that's an 8% miss potential

huh.

> [!question] are *we* the natural competitor for that share? talk to [[Yuki Tanaka]] about ACME's competitive position in [Globex's main category](../companies/acme-corp.md#widget-distribution-segment).

## conversation w/ Dana

talked to [Dana Liu](../people/dana-liu.md) at 11. she's not convinced. her view:

1. globex relationship is sticky — switching costs are high (custom tooling, ~18 month requalification)
2. even if globex diversifies, the spend stays at BW for current SKUs
3. tariff resolution will lift all boats — focus on relative not absolute

she's not wrong. the switching cost point is the real pushback. need to find out what % of globex spend is on commodity SKUs (low switching cost) vs custom (high). see [[supplier-switching-costs]].

## back to ACME's side

if globex IS going to diversify, we want to be in the conversation. flagging to [[Yuki Tanaka]] and [Marcus Reyes](../people/marcus-reyes.md). marcus runs corp dev — this could be a partnership lead, not just a competitive observation.

re-read [DCF assumptions](../methodology/dcf-framework.md#core-assumptions) for our [own model](../companies/acme-corp.md#current-model). if we win even 5% of globex spend, that's $14M topline — material but not transformative. probably right to flag but not to size in the [Q2 IC thesis](../decisions/2026-q2-thesis-call.md).

## small thing

[Yuki](../people/yuki-tanaka.md) sent the [draft IC memo](../memos/acme-investment-memo.docx) — opened it. exec summary is fine but the [base case](../memos/acme-investment-memo.docx#base-case) is using stale tariff assumptions. flagged. she'll fix monday.

## tomorrow

- [ ] requalification cost research — switching cost evidence
- [ ] sync with marcus re: globex outreach
- [ ] finalize [comparable set](../decisions/2026-q2-thesis-call.md#comparable-set) — yuki's deadline today is now friday
